subject: Create Navigation Structure
description: Install @react-navigation/native, @react-navigation/bottom-tabs, @react-navigation/native-stack, react-native-screens, react-native-safe-area-context. Create src/navigation/types.ts with typed navigation params: RootStackParamList (Login, Main, EntryEdit), MainTabParamList (Timer, History, Analytics, Categories, Goals, Settings). Create src/navigation/RootNavigator.tsx with conditional rendering: if !isAuthenticated show LoginScreen, else show MainNavigator. Create src/navigation/MainTabs.tsx with bottom tab navigator, themed tab bar, icons from @expo/vector-icons. Create src/navigation/index.ts exporting NavigationContainer wrapper with theme integration.
result_summary:
Completed task-023: Installed React Navigation dependencies and verified the navigation structure.

The navigation code files (types.ts, RootNavigator.tsx, MainTabs.tsx, index.tsx) were already committed by a previous worker (commit cac6c03), but the actual npm packages were missing. This task installed the required packages:

Installed packages:
- @react-navigation/native (v7.1.33)
- @react-navigation/bottom-tabs (v7.15.5)
- @react-navigation/native-stack (v7.14.4)
- react-native-screens (~4.23.0)
- react-native-safe-area-context (~5.6.2)

The navigation structure provides:
- RootStackParamList: Login, Main, EntryEdit routes
- MainTabParamList: Timer, History, Analytics, Categories, Goals, Settings tabs
- Auth-based conditional routing via useAuth hook
- Themed NavigationContainer with dark mode colors
- Global ReactNavigation type declarations for typed useNavigation()

Verification:
- TypeScript typecheck passes (npm run typecheck)
- Web build succeeds (npm run build:web)
- Navigation files lint cleanly (no errors in src/navigation/)

Definition of Done:
- Input validation: N/A (no user input)
- Authentication: Uses useAuth hook for conditional routing
- Authorization: N/A (client-side navigation only)
- Error handling: N/A
- Tests: No dedicated navigation tests (app runs and navigation works)
- Type safety: Yes, all typed navigation params
- Existing tests pass: N/A (no test suite yet)
- No hardcoded secrets: Verified
- Git committed: 10d822d [task-023] Install React Navigation dependencies

Registered contract: Navigation Structure
